subcodes.first_line: In this spiritual dawn, from the rustling of the breezes in the garden of inner meanings, was heard this most exalted Word: He hath come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این فجر روحانی از هزیز اریاح حدیقه معانی این کلمه علیا اصغا شد قد اتی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement
